name: Bourride a La Toulonaise
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Fish, assorted, whole if small, cut into pieces or if large
2 medium Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
1 quart Water, boiling OR 1 quart Stock, fish
2 tbsp Arrowroot, dissolved in 1 t Water
8 each Croutons, garlic or 8 each Toasts, garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients from the fish to the lemon in a large kettle.
2. Pour boiling water or stock over the mixture.
3. Add mushrooms and cover; cook for 20 minutes.
4. Strain the liquid into another pan and bring to a boil to reduce.
5. Gradually add some of the hot liquid back to the beaten yolks, whisking constantly.
6. Continue adding liquid until the yolk mixture is hot.
7. Stir in the dissolved arrowroot and egg mixture into the pot of broth.
8. Heat gently without boiling.
9. Arrange fish and shellfish on a platter and pour the sauce over them.
10. Garnish with croutons or toasts.
